items.name: Human-vs-AI-Text-Detection
items.description: "A machine learning project designed to accurately distinguish between human-written and AI-generated content. It provides a reliable framework for detecting linguistic patterns unique to synthetic text."

items.name: scikit-learn_bench

items.name: ML-MCTS
items.description: An optimised modular C++ Monte Carlo Tree Search framework for machine learning experiments based on AlphaZero and AlphaGo theory.

items.name: Hybrid-Attention-based-Multi-scale-Anomaly-Detection
items.description: HAMAD is a novel, lightweight machine learning framework engineered for real-time network anomaly detection. Developed to bridge the gap between the high accuracy of deep learning and the strict resource constraints of IoT and edge computing environments, it addresses critical challenges in modern cybersecurity.

By moving away from subjective human appraisal, the system utilizes machine learning to provide objective and high-precision financial insights. The model analyzes over 500,000 unique records to understand complex depreciation patterns

items.name: NeuroWeave
items.description: NeuroWeave is an interactive Cybersecurity Command Center and Adversarial Machine Learning Framework. It simulates live Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) viruses to expose the catastrophic structural vulnerabilities of Neural Networks, while analyzing the mathematical limits of Spatial Sieve defense pipelines.
